name: CP-IM
description: Circular Potential Assessment Information Management and Decision Support Tool
background IP: Background IP: The CP-IM will be developed based on the existing Open Source solution of project partner MFX and the commercial facility management BIM solution of project partner DMO.

name: Building Assessment Robots
description: Wall climbing and drone-based robotic solutions to automatically assess the circular potential embodied in a building. The solutions will be based on the robotic wall-climbing robotic platform (TRL-2) and commercial drone and sensor solutions.

name: Tiny House Production
description: Robot-supported automated upgrade solutions for building components for assembling tiny houses completely from reused components.
background IP: Architectural solutions for the upgrade of building products (windows, façade elements, HVAC elements) developed by 3L on the P2Endure project

name: BIM for circular value flow planning
description: Tools and methods to allow for understanding possibilities to reuse materials/construction products beyond their initial use within a single building.
